title: Is Your Brain a Quantum Computer?
summary: This short video explores the hypothesis that the human brain functions as a biological quantum computer. It discusses how quantum computing concepts like qubits might explain human intuition and synchronicities, referencing Roger Penrose's theories.

key_claims.claim: Quantum computers can potentially send information back in time
Scientists have documented the ability to reverse qubit positions in quantum computations
Roger Penrose believes the brain is a biological quantum computer
Human intuition and snap decision-making could be explained by quantum processes in the brain
Synchronicities might be explained by the brain accessing future information and sending back traces
